productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Brown Handbags
description: Update your wardrobe with this chic bag from United Colours of Benetton. The bag can be worn both as a handbag with a long strap or as a tote. You can pair it with your casual outfits wherever you go.The trendy style is so attractive that it is gauranteed to get you attractive stares all day long.  Length 37 cmsWidth  3.5 cmsHeight 40 cmsMade of 80% polyester and 20% polyurethaneOne roomy zippered compartmentOne mobile pouch and one zipper compartment inside for essentialsLeather handle, long leather strap with classy metal chain and buckles with branded zippersLeather base and magnectic leather closure  Brand name badge, brand name appliqued on the insideCareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
